---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report
title: 'bug. '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
(Steps to reproduce the behavior)

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots or videos**
If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain your problem.

**Version**
The addon version. If this uses an old version, the bug report will be automatically closed

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.

**Other addons**
If this field is not empty, this bug report will be automatically closed (required addons in the workshop are not counted)
